creator: max@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Thanks for the contribution.  However, we can add new package to 
our collection only if it is submitted as a port. 

If you are the author of the software and if you are not making the 
source code available, still please make a port that fetches the  
precompiled binary and installs the files. 

Please refer to the handbook for complete information on how to  
create a port.  (Well, you probably know how since the file  you  
submitted is a package.)
